calendarNotes:
Guilford County Schools begins the 2027-2028 school year on August 23, 2027, and the school year ends June 8, 2028. Spring Break runs April 10–14, 2028. In 2027-2028, GCS and Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools share the same spring break window — both districts break April 10–14. This alignment is not the norm: the two districts' spring breaks land in different weeks more often than they coincide. Families coordinating between GCS and CMS in 2027-2028 have a rare shared break window, making it a natural year to plan extended family travel or joint childcare arrangements that span both districts.

Winston-Salem/Forsyth County Schools does not currently have a published 2027-2028 calendar. Families in GCS with relatives or friends in WSFC schools should check the official Winston-Salem/Forsyth website directly once that calendar is released. Do not assume WSFC's break will align with GCS's April 10–14 window — the Piedmont Triad's three major school systems set spring break independently each year, and stagger years are common.

Winter break in 2027-2028 ends December 31 — students return January 2, 2028, one day earlier than in most recent years. The spring break window (April 10–14) falls approximately two weeks after Easter Sunday (March 26, 2028), so families whose travel plans typically center on the Easter weekend will find the two do not align in 2027-2028 and should plan accordingly.
